falsification_attempt: Checked whether the v2 port lost the local compact derive `maybe_zero` behavior because `crates/storage/codecs/derive` is no longer checked in. The workspace depends on `reth-codecs-derive 0.3.1`, and the installed source for that version contains the same `maybe_zero` detection in `load_field_from_segments`. The active transaction codecs also carry bitflag compatibility tests.
missed_risks: This is tied to the resolved registry version; changing `reth-codecs-derive` should re-run compact derive and transaction codec compatibility tests.
notes: The atom is covered by the upstream derive dependency used by the v2 port, not by a local source copy.
